description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-meter

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-meter/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Bar colors (low/medium/high/optimum), track, labels. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. meter role. aria-valuenow/min/max. aria-label. Visual + text representation.
3. **Functionality** — Value/min/max/low/high/optimum. Label. Color thresholds. Size variants.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. Numeric constraints.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Bar fill animation. Responsive width.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Value ranges. Color thresholds. ARIA. Edge cases.
8. **Storybook** — Value ranges. Thresholds. Labels. Sizes.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-meter
